amendment.description: In the nature of a substitute.

vote.text: Amendment SA 5820 agreed to in Senate by Unanimous Consent.

action.text: Amendment SA 5820 proposed by Senator Thune for Senator Whitehouse.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 5820 proposed by Senator Thune for Senator Whitehouse.
Senate amendment agreed to: Amendment SA 5820 agreed to in Senate by Unanimous Consent.
